questions.question: The `bash builtins` -r option the maximum amount of cpu time in seconds.
questions.explanation: Incorrect. `bash builtins` -r option the maximum real-time scheduling priority.
questions.reason: Approved in final review after source and source_ir_id confirmation.

questions.question: The `bash builtins` -u option the maximum number of processes available to a single user.
